use tracing::{trace, Level};
use serde::Serialize;

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Payload {
    records: Vec<Record>,
    metadata: Metadata,
}

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Record {
    id: u64,
    values: Vec<f64>,
}

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Metadata {
    source: String,
    timestamp: u64,
}

fn process_event(payload: &Payload) {
    // BAD: payload serialized for trace even when tracing is disabled
    let json = serde_json::to_string(payload).unwrap();
    trace!("processing event: {}", json);
}
